title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - Future-Proofing EOAs: Free EIP-7702 Infra Integration
description:
EIP-7702 brings Account Abstraction (AA) benefits to EOAs while maintaining their existing structure.

In this workshop by Michael Messele (Etherspot, CEO and Co-founder) and Nikhil Kumar (Etherspot, Software Developer) , the Etherspot team will guide you through integrating the censorship-resistant EIP-7702 infrastructure SDK (Free and Simple). Wallet teams will learn how to reduce infrastructure costs and unlock advanced AA features. dApp developers will discover how leveraging the 7702 infrastructure enhances UX, reduces friction, and drives stronger user adoption.

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
